name: Japandi
description: A dialogue between Japanese wabi-sabi and Scandinavian hygge. Every piece in this collection values restraint — natural materials, honest construction, and forms that grow more beautiful as they age.

name: Industrial Loft
description: Blackened steel, reclaimed timber, and hand-poured concrete. The Industrial Loft collection brings the texture of a converted warehouse into your home — without surrendering warmth.
